children.heading: Annual report
children.label: a Annual report
children.text: The Director shall provide to the relevant authorizing and appropriations committees of Congress an annual report describing projects supported by the Directorate during the previous year.

children.heading: Roadmap
children.label: b Roadmap
children.text: Not later than 1 year after , the Director shall provide to the relevant authorizing and appropriations committees of Congress a roadmap describing the strategic vision that the Directorate will use to guide investment decisions over the following 3 years.August 9, 2022

a strategic vision for the next 5 years for the Directorate, including a description of how the Foundation will increase funding for research and education for populations underrepresented in STEM and geographic areas; and

a description of the planned activities of the Directorate to secure federally funded science and technology pursuant to section 1746 of the National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2020 (; note) and and the requirements under part D of this subchapter and subtitle E of title VI.Public Law 116–9242 U.S.C. 6601section 6605 of this title

children.heading: Selection criteria report
children.label: d Selection criteria report
children.text: Not later than 24 months after the establishment of the Directorate, the Director shall prepare and submit a report to Congress regarding the use of alternative methods for the selection of award recipients and the distribution of funding to recipients, as compared to the traditional peer review process.
